title: angostura obovata
intro: Angostura obovata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Angostura tree or Angostura bark, native to South America and the Caribbean. The medicinal properties of Angostura obovata are attributed to its bark, which contains compounds like tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Angostura obovata include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-bacterial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Angostura obovata include a bitter-tasting extract known as Angostura bitters, which is often used as a digestive aid and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
